capture_method: FastMCP tool registrations; input_schemas derived from function type hints as FastMCP would expose them.
notes: This is metalmind's stdio MCP fallback — the tool manifest a user would see IF they disabled the loopback HTTP transport and fell back to MCP. The happy path advertises zero tools to Claude (see metalmind-loopback.json).

tools.name: search_vault
tools.description: Semantic search over the Obsidian Knowledge vault.

tools.name: related_notes
tools.description: Return forward links and backlinks for a note.

tools.name: expand_search
tools.description: search_vault + wikilinks discovered in source files.
